plugins.name: create-html-deck
plugins.description: Generate Shockproof AI branded training presentation modules as PNG slides or PDF using HTML/CSS flexbox layout with Puppeteer PNG export. Flow-based API — no manual coordinates.

plugins.name: convert-pdf-to-html-deck
plugins.description: Convert an existing PDF presentation into a narrated Shockproof AI training video. Lossless mode keeps original PDF visuals; semantic mode re-renders every slide with Shockproof AI components.
